_comment: Static registry fallback — used when Supabase env vars are unset. Mirrors the FLOOR seed (supabase/seed/01_floor.sql): the two always-on robots and their property, with IDs matching the Robot Status API. Static and status-free: live status comes from the API (/heartbeat, /telemetry). Add-on robots (robot-3 curveball, prop-2 scale) are introduced live via the API admin toggles and are intentionally NOT in the registry.
